data.name: DevExpress.XtraPrinting.PdfExportOptions.ShowPrintDialogOnOpen
data.value: 打开时显示打印对话框

data.name: DevExpress.XtraPrinting.HtmlExportOptions.EmbedImagesInHTML
data.value: 在 HTML 中嵌入图像

data.name: DevExpress.XtraPrinting.NativeFormatOptions.ShowOptionsBeforeSave
data.value: 显示在保存之前的选项

data.name: DevExpress.XtraPrinting.PrintPreviewOptions.ShowOptionsBeforeExport
data.value: 导出前显示选项对话框
